tutorial.title: Pottery Slab Tutorial
tutorial.subtitle: Form the slab, shape the clay

objectives.label: Clay a Cobblestone
substeps: Right-click a placed Cobblestone with a Clay Ball to clay it.
Place a single Clayed Cobblestone where you want the Pottery Slab.

objectives.label: Form the Pottery Slab
substeps: It is packed into a Pottery Slab in place.

objectives.label: Shape pottery
substeps: Right-click the Pottery Slab with clay to shape a piece.
Pieces come out unfired — harden them in the Kiln.
No quality minigame: pottery is a non-skill craft.

pages.text: &6Pottery&r shapes soft river clay on a Pottery Slab into vessels, buckets, bricks, and crucibles. Pieces are formed unfired, then hardened in the kiln into durable ceramics — the settlement's first storage and liquid-carrying goods that do not need metal.

Pottery is a non-skill craft: there is no quality minigame. Pots and fired clay buckets hold water and lava, raw mud brick bridges into mud-brick construction, and the crucible is the vessel that will later carry molten metal.
The Pottery Slab can also be run as a tier-2 workshop, with a Potter NPC fulfilling orders from your stored clay.
